articles.title: Stellar (XLM) Invests Big in Wyre With $5 Million Ecosystem Upgrade
articles.description: The move comes on the heels of Stellar’s xlm cryptocurrency outperforming many of its peers to start 2021. It reached a price of $0.44 on Jan 6, more than doubling its starting point for the year. However, after reaching the peak in the first week of January, xlm has retreated down to the mid $0.20’s … Continued

articles.title: Major Crypto Exchange Adds XRP Pair Despite SEC Complaint
articles.description: XRP can now be traded against USD Coin on the KuCoin cryptocurrency exchange

articles.title: IOTA's Identity Solution Can Protect Your Data From Tech Giants: IOTA Foundation's Jelle Millenaar
articles.description: Jelle Millenaar dismissed popular misconceptions around IOTA's approach to data integrity

articles.title: Almost 100 Million XRP Sent to Coinbase by Anonymous User
articles.description: Whale Alert spreads the word that an anonymous whale has wired a whopping 99.9 million XRP to one of the largest exchanges, Coinbase, which recently delisted XRP

articles.title: Why Polkadot is the Future of DeFi
articles.description: In the last year, decentralized finance (DeFi) has gone from being a relatively unexplored crypto niche to a bustling industry filled with a diverse array of protocols and tools that offer new services and opportunities to users. As it stands, the vast majority of DeFi applications are built on the Ethereum blockchain, due to its popularity among decentralized application (dApp) developers...
